name: Land Development Preliminary Agreement (Joint Venture)
description: A preliminary agreement between a landowner and a developer outlining the profit/asset split and basic terms for a real estate construction project.
content:
PRELIMINARY LAND DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENT

LANDOWNER: {{landowner_name}} (ID/SSN: {{landowner_id}})
ADDRESS: {{landowner_address}}

DEVELOPER / CONTRACTOR: {{developer_name}}
ADDRESS: {{developer_address}}

1. PROPERTY INFORMATION: The real property located at {{property_address}}, identified by Parcel Number: {{parcel_number}}.

2. PROFIT / ASSET SPLIT: The Parties mutually agree that the completed construction project (units/revenue) shall be divided as follows: {{landowner_share}}% to the Landowner, and {{developer_share}}% to the Developer.

3. CONSTRUCTION TERMS & STANDARDS:

{{construction_terms}}

4. DEFINITIVE AGREEMENT: The Parties agree to execute a formal, legally binding Definitive Joint Venture and Construction Agreement before a Notary Public or legal counsel no later than {{formatDate deadline_for_final_contract}}, which will incorporate the terms outlined in this preliminary protocol.

LANDOWNER


Signature: ________________

DEVELOPER


Signature: ________________

Date of Protocol: {{formatDate protocol_date}}

fields.name: construction_terms
fields.label: Construction Terms & Quality Standards
fields.placeholder: e.g., Construction to be completed within 24 months of obtaining permits. High-grade materials to be used.
